title: Cow's milk allergy non-responsive to amino acid-based formula? A successful transplanted patient with immune dysregulation, polyendocrinopathy, enteropathy, and X-linked syndrome.
author_string: Veramendi-Espinoza, Liz, Rentería-Valdiviezo, Claudia Alejandra, Díaz-Subauste, Roxana, Aldave-Becerra, Juan Carlos, Alva-Lozada, Guisela et al.
abstract: The wide variety of IPEX symptoms leads to diagnosis and treatment delay with fatal outcomes if left untreated before two first years of life. Cow's milk allergy non-responsive to amino acid-based formula must raise suspicion of this syndrome.
